title: Create: Petrol Powered
body:
WILL MERGE WITH [CREATE: INDUSTRIAL CHEMISTRY](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-industrial-chemistry) WHEN CREATE: INDUSTRIAL CHEMISTRY REACHED 1.0, THIS DO NOT HAVE SUPPORT ANYMORE

![Flat-twin engine](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/thumbnails/653/997/310/172/asd.png)

Flat-twin engine with the create mod!

**Community Discord for Create: Petrol Powered:**

[https://discord.gg/fGUhb7Mwv2](https://discord.gg/fGUhb7Mwv2 "https://discord.gg/fGUhb7Mwv2")

**About:**

Create: Petrol Powered implemented oil drills, asphalt concrete, and diesel engines, but also, this is an addon of [Create: Industrial Chemistry](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-industrial-chemistry "Create: Industrial Chemistry"), which means you can distill oils to get alkanes, which helps the organic synthesis in Create: Industrial Chemistry.

**Content:**

- Oil drills: drill oil from deserts, badlands, and all snowy biomes, the oil output is on the back.

- Fractional Distillation: distills the crude oil from the oil drills, also can separate natural gas to alkanes.

- Diesel Engine: Allows you to burn the fuel that you get from distilling the crude oil  
  
**IMPORTANT:**

Requires [the create mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/create "the create mod"), [Create: Industrial Chemistry](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-industrial-chemistry "Create: Industrial Chemistry"), also flywheel if the create mod asks you to add that
